prompt: Write a walking bass line that moves chromatically between chord roots.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q q q q q q q q q q q q q q q
    n 36 40 43 45 48 47 46 45 43 42 41 40 38 39 40 41

  ch 3 Chords

    n 48 52 55

    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare

    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat

    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI successfully generated a 4-measure quarter-note walking bass line with clear chromatic passing tones between scale degrees.
